title: SLO Evaluation Result
description: Governed SLO evaluation result produced by the BH-BJ SLO control plane. Captures SLI measurements, error budget state, and enforcement decision derived from validator execution results.

slo_status.description: Overall SLO health derived from SLI measurements.

slis.description: Individual SLI measurements, each in range [0.0, 1.0].

completeness.description: Fraction of expected validators that passed.

timeliness.description: Timeliness SLI derived from validator execution.

traceability.description: Traceability SLI derived from validator execution.

traceability_integrity.description: Traceability integrity SLI derived from validator execution.

burn_rate.description: Rolling-window error budget burn rates per SLI.

enforcement_action.description: Enforcement decision: allow, warn, or block.

violations.description: SLI names that breached their thresholds.

enforcement_reason.description: Human-readable reason for the enforcement decision.
